offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry errors cause cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of appointment logs into billing files instead of manual billing processes.
problem: manual entry errors in billing submissions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing solutions

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for first users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
